mapper.select: SELECT id, biz_code, version_no, config_json, status, publish_remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM lc_biz_config_snapshot WHERE biz_code = #{bizCode} AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY version_no DESC

SELECT id, biz_code, version_no, config_json, status, publish_remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM lc_biz_config_snapshot WHERE biz_code = #{bizCode} AND version_no = #{versionNo} AND del_flag = '0'
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(version_no), 0) FROM lc_biz_config_snapshot WHERE biz_code = #{bizCode} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lc_biz_config_snapshot (biz_code, version_no, config_json, status, publish_remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark) VALUES (#{bizCode}, #{versionNo}, #{configJson}, #{status}, #{publishRemark}, '0', #{createBy}, NOW(), '', NULL, #{remark})
